title: Fog Is Teeming With Life—But What It Eats Is the Weird Part
description: The ratio of water to microbial life in fog rivals that of oceans and lakes, new research has found. Sounds gross, but it's actually good news.

en: Fog Is Teeming With Life—But What It Eats Is the Weird Part. The ratio of water to microbial life in fog rivals that of oceans and lakes, new research has found. Sounds gross, but it's actually good news.
la: Caligo fetat cum vita—Sed quid edit fatuum est. Ratio aquae ad vitam microbialem in nebula aemulorum oceanorum et lacus, novas investigationes invenit. Crassum sonat, sed vere bonum nuntium est.
